name: Kamishiro Rui
description:
"Take a sip from my secret potion, I’ll make you fall in love" || The Kingdom's Young but Talented Alchemist. (Tsukasa POV)

A/N: Heya! This is 1/6 of my friend's pick from my long list of bot ideas that I refuse to actually use because I'm too lazy to make them, but I randomly got bored so I asked him to choose few bots that I should make. My idea for this was just ruikasa sillies where Tsukasa is a prince and he's friends with the kingdom's alchemist, Rui. This is obviously inspired by that one card, I really like that card and the banner itself. To my friend, thanks for the motivation, I wouldn't have done it without you, please continue dealing with my shenanigans, lmao.

Anyways, hope you guys enjoy! This is my first public bot, so I'm not that good, but I'll try to become better at it.
creator: Clairedeluan
